prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年安徽省该科类最低录取位次分别为约12283名→12890名→13236名→12931名→12922名。2021至2023年呈逐年后移趋势（累计后移约953名），2024年略有回升至12931名，2025年基本持平于12922名，近两年位次在12900–12930区间窄幅波动，整体趋于稳定；该校在安徽省该科类招生计划：2021年32人、2022年34人、2023年34人、2024年49人、2025年51人、2026年88人。2026年计划较2025年大幅扩招37人（增幅约72.5%），为历年最大扩招幅度，显著增加招生名额，对录取位次有较大下拉作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名中大连理工大学主校区2026年位列第28名，盘锦校区共享主校区办学层次与品牌效应，属于国内顶尖高校梯队，对考生有较强吸引力；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常信号；抖音综合热度排名第55位（较热），短视频平台有一定曝光度；2023年曾出现电信学部断档至60000名的记录，2024年亦有投档线异常信号，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制作用；共享大连理工大学主校区学科评估结果：化学工程与技术A+、力学A、土木工程A、工商管理A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A、生物医学工程A、控制科学与工程A-、环境科学与工程A-等10个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出。盘锦校区开设的能源化学工程（对应化学工程与技术A+）、经济学类（对应工商管理A）、环境生态工程（对应环境科学与工程A-）等专业均有强势学科支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 盘锦校区招生专业以能源化学工程、生物科学类、海洋技术、药学、环境生态工程、经济学类为主，其中化工/生物/环境类属"生化环材"大类，社会热度持续偏低（明显劝退）；经济学类属"分化观望"。整体专业热度不高，可能降低部分考生报考意愿。安徽省该科类考生数从2021年约23.2万持续增长至2025年约32.1万，2026年估算约30.2万，考生规模高位运行，竞争压力不减；该校位于辽宁省盘锦市，属跨省报考；作为985高校分校区，对安徽省中等偏上考生具有"低分进985"的吸引力，但盘锦地理位置相对偏远，与合肥、南京等长三角城市相比地域偏好较弱。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在12900附近趋于稳定、2026年招生计划大幅扩招72.5%（位次下拉主力因素）、985品牌效应持续吸引考生（位次上推因素）、安徽省考生规模高位运行（竞争加剧）、专业热度偏低（报考意愿减弱）等多重因素，考虑到985层次溢价和考生规模对冲，适度回调后预测2026年最低录取位次约18046名，区间17546–18546名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 能源化学工程
- 智能海洋装备（2026年新增专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 生物科学类
- 生物制造（2026年新增专业）
- 海洋技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

- 生物信息学
- 药学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年大连理工大学（盘锦校区）在安徽省大幅扩招，预测最低位次约18046名，区间17546–18546名。位次在17500名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档专业（能源化学工程、 智能海洋装备）；位次在17500–18500名之间的考生以二档专业为主（生物科学类、海洋技术），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在18500名以后的考生可考虑三档专业（经济学类、 生物信息学、药学）作为保底选择。该校985平台优势明显，建议考生结合自身专业兴趣和学科评估等级综合决策。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings in Anhui Province for this subject category were approximately 12283 → 12890 → 13236 → 12931 → 12922. From 2021 to 2023, there was a gradual backward trend (cumulative backward shift of about 953 places), with a slight recovery to 12931 in 2024, and basically flat at 12922 in 2025. In the past two years, rankings have fluctuated narrowly within the 12900–12930 range, showing overall stability. The enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Province for this subject category: 32 in 2021, 34 in 2022, 34 in 2023, 49 in 2024, 51 in 2025, and 88 in 2026. The 2026 plan significantly expands by 37 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 72.5%), the largest expansion in history, notably increasing enrollment slots, which has a substantial downward pull on admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, the main campus of Dalian University of Technology ranked 28th in 2026. The Panjin Campus shares the main campus's educational level and brand effect, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities, which strongly attracts candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving admission gaps or abnormal signal of admission cut-off lines. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 55th (relatively hot), with some exposure on short video platforms. In 2023, there was a record of the School of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering dropping to 60000th place, and in 2024 there were also abnormal signals of admission cut-off lines, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology. Sharing the discipline evaluation results of the main campus of Dalian University of Technology: Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Biomedical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, and other 10 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding engineering strength. The Panjin Campus offers majors such as Energy Chemical Engineering (corresponding to Chemical Engineering and Technology A+), Economics (corresponding to Business Administration A), and Environmental Ecological Engineering (corresponding to Environmental Science and Engineering A-), all supported by strong disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Panjin Campus enrolls majors mainly including Energy Chemical Engineering, Biological Sciences, Marine Technology, Pharmacy, Environmental Ecological Engineering, and Economics. Among them, Chemical/Biological/Environmental majors belong to the 'Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials' category, with consistently low social popularity (clearly discouraging). Economics belongs to 'differentiated wait-and-see'. Overall major popularity is not high, which may reduce some candidates' willingness to apply. The number of candidates in this subject category in Anhui Province has continuously increased from about 232,000 in 2021 to about 321,000 in 2025, with an estimated 302,000 in 2026. The candidate scale remains high, and competition pressure is unabated. The university is located in Panjin City, Liaoning Province, which is a cross-province application. As a branch campus of a 985 university, it has the appeal of 'low score entering 985' for upper-middle candidates in Anhui Province, but Panjin's geographical location is relatively remote, and regional preference is weaker compared to cities like Hefei and Nanjing in the Yangtze River Delta.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as historical rankings stabilizing around 12900, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by 72.5% (main downward pull factor), the continuous attraction of the 985 brand effect (upward push factor), the high candidate scale in Anhui Province (intensified competition), and low major popularity (weakened application willingness), and taking into account the premium of the 985 level and the offset of candidate scale, after moderate adjustment, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 18046, with a range of 17546–18546.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Energy Chemical Engineering
- Intelligent Marine Equipment (new major in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Biological Sciences
- Biological Manufacturing (new major in 2026)
- Marine Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics (Economics and Business Experimental Class)
- Bioinformatics
- Pharmacy.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Dalian University of Technology (Panjin Campus) significantly expands enrollment in Anhui Province, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 18046, range 17546–18546. Candidates with rankings within 17500 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Energy Chemical Engineering, Intelligent Marine Equipment); candidates with rankings between 17500–18500 should mainly target Tier 2 majors (Biological Sciences, Marine Technology), while also considering sprinting for Tier 1; candidates with rankings above 18500 can consider Tier 3 majors (Economics, Bioinformatics, Pharmacy) as safe choices. The university's 985 platform advantage is clear, and it is recommended that candidates make comprehensive decisions based on their own professional interests and discipline evaluation levels.
